description: Create Part9_Panels.mqh - All dashboard panels ported to MQL5 Comment() and ChartObject text labels. And create the main MasterAlgo.mq5 EA file that #includes all parts and implements OnInit/OnDeinit/OnTick orchestration.
steps: Create Part9_Panels.mqh at the repo root with MQL5 dashboard rendering using ObjectCreate/ObjectSetString for chart labels or Comment() for text display

Port Engine Readout panel: Wave direction+phase, wave progress+target, fractal stack, resolution state, residual energy, attractor+node, network bias, node count, pressure, invalidation price, rotation state
Port Chief Strategist (Senseei HUD) panel: master direction, phase, progress gauge, intent, alignment/conflict, confidence/threat, opportunity+timing, resolution, cycle/depth, action

Port Dual Co-Pilot panel: Opportunity section (sitrep, vector, flight plan primary/alt paths with probabilities, contacts, cycle radar MN/W/D/H4/H1 bars with completion icons, target locks P/S/E, H4/H1 status, firing solution grade). Master Chief section (bias+regime, what's happening narrative, key levels, headed+next entry, network magnet, risk assessment, blockers, bottom line)

Port Wave Matrix panel: per-TF wave narrative (6 timeframes with direction+phase family), execution probability (continuation/reversal/expansion/new/absorption/stand-down %), outcome, fractal confidence, MTF fusion interpretation/confidence/trend/LTF reversal, multi-level progress gauges per TF
Port Campaign Ownership panel: campaign state, who owns price, location, compression regime, curve budget to HTF, recursive depth, maturity+curve coordinates, participant zone, interference state
Port Curve Energy panel: direction+state, energy in/dissipated/residual gauges, displacement ATR, convexity, compression, maturity

Port Curve Tree panel: trade direction, recursion depth/budget, live nodes, owner energy, curve origin->extreme->now coordinates, phase (node), compression persistence force/state/trend, trade alive judgement, narrative lineage/retrace sequence/chain vitality/HTF parent threat

Create MasterAlgo.mq5 at the repo root: #property strict, #include all 9 Part*.mqh files in order, implement OnInit() (initialize all state, build default configs, RefreshSeries, print startup message), OnDeinit() (cleanup chart objects), OnTick() orchestration: RefreshSeries -> IsNewBar guard -> UpdatePhaseEngine -> UpdateARC -> UpdateLetraEngines (all 6 TFs) -> UpdateEnergyFramework -> UpdateNetwork -> UpdateTimeIntel -> UpdateCurveTree -> UpdateSenseei -> ManageArcInstitutionalExits -> ExecuteTrading -> UpdatePanels
acceptance_criteria: Part9_Panels.mqh exists with valid MQL5 syntax
MasterAlgo.mq5 exists with proper #includes and OnInit/OnDeinit/OnTick
All panels display relevant information from engine outputs
OnTick orchestration calls engines in correct dependency order
Panel rendering uses MQL5 chart object API (ObjectCreate, ObjectSetString, ObjectSetInteger)
verification: Read MasterAlgo.mq5 and verify all #includes are present in correct order
Verify OnTick calls engines in dependency order
Verify panels reference actual output variables from the engines
findings: Both files created successfully. Part9_Panels.mqh (515 lines) implements 7 dashboard panels using OBJ_LABEL chart objects + Comment() summary. MasterAlgo.mq5 (100 lines) includes all 9 parts and orchestrates OnInit/OnDeinit/OnTick in correct dependency order. All referenced globals and functions verified to exist across the codebase. No duplicate function names. Brace matching verified.
